items.name_en: 🌷【With full original red box packaging】🌷【New】The GG Emblem series reinterprets classic patterns with creative design and innovative functions, creating a choice for collection in the coming years. This bi-fold cardholder is crafted with beige and dark brown new GG interlocking pattern fabric, reinterpreting the new accessory series. It features multiple card slots and other multifunctional pockets.
items.name_cn:
🌷【With full original red box packaging】🌷【New】The GG Emblem series reinterprets classic patterns with creative design and innovative functions, creating a choice for collection in the coming years. This bi-fold cardholder is crafted with beige and dark brown new GG interlocking pattern fabric, reinterpreting the new accessory series. It features multiple card slots and other multifunctional pockets.
Beige and dark brown new GG interlocking pattern coated fabric
Brown leather lining
Inside: 8 card slots, 2 hidden pockets, and 1 external card slot
Weight: approx. 0.085 kg
Model: 821209
Open dimensions: 15cm (W) x 12cm (H); Closed dimensions: 7.5cm (W) x 12cm (H)
Color: Brown PVC/Original leather
Italian creation

items.name_en: 🌷Includes full original green box packaging🌷GG Marmont Wallet. This GG Marmont Wallet is crafted in classic and durable black leather, adding a classic piece to the 'Aria' collection. The double-G hardware reinterprets the 1970s belt buckle design using matching resin material. The combination of classic design and monochrome colorway highlights a modern fashion style.
